data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for check-in tracking.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the check-in tracking functionality, specifically who arrived and when. However, the provided evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case mentions the need for check-in tracking, but without concrete evidence, the requirement cannot be validated.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of check-in tracking (who arrived, when).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the check-in tracking requirement.
